title.en: Ye Tian rushed out of this magic circle.

content.en:
Ye Tian went to other space-time regions one after another, and found that all the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits were gone, and he couldn't find the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits.

"It's time to be satisfied, let's go!"

Ye Tian rushed out of this magic circle.

As soon as he could, Ye Tian was attacked by the Wild Golden Grass.

Although Ye Tian couldn't defeat it, the Wild Gold Grass's attack methods were limited, and the means of chasing and killing were even more limited.

Therefore, Ye Tian directly chose to escape, and the barren golden grass was quickly gotten rid of by Ye Tian.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to look for resources in other places in Shilongyuan, after all, in addition to the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit, other resources here were also very rich, so he naturally had to harvest them in a big way!

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian gained a lot and found many precious resources.

this day.

There were some changes in Shi Longyuan.

Where the Stone Dragon Demon Lord was sealed, a terrifying black stone dragon was entrenched in countless time and space, and its body was suppressed by dense seals, unable to move.

However, he was looking forward to it and excited at the moment.

"Hahaha, a bunch of waste, what about reinforcing the seal, I haven't found a way to get out yet?Wait, I'll be able to get out soon!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord muttered.

And his hope of getting out of trouble is the barren golden grass.

The barren golden grass absorbed his aura of power, maybe for the other perfect controllers, what was the point of absorbing some of the breath?

However, he spent countless years releasing these breaths, not to play, but to get out of trouble, these breaths are the effect of one of his secret techniques, and now they are absorbed by the Wild Golden Grass.

He can rely on his connection with the Wild Golden Grass to continuously input his own power to the Wild Golden Grass, and thus transfer it to the Wild Golden Grass.

As long as he can get out of trouble, he will be reborn in the Golden Grass.

When the time comes, he immediately commits suicide and resurrects somewhere at the end of the world in the future.

In that way, those strong men in the Ruins of Eternity would not be able to help him.

As for confronting the top forces of the Eternal Ruins, he is not qualified yet, what he wants is to escape, and he dare not imagine anything else.

Time passed slowly, and the power on the Wild Golden Grass became stronger and stronger, but because the Wild Golden Grass had a hidden perfection-level ancestral endowment, plus those perfect controllers were outside of Shilongyuan.

As a result, these Perfect Controllers were unaware of the changes in the Wild Gold Grass.

"Almost!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord laughed wildly.

Rumble!!!!!

In the dark, the connection between the Stone Dragon Demon Lord and the Wild Gold Grass was completely opened, and the power of the Stone Dragon Demon Lord was poured into the body of the Wild Gold Grass.

In an instant, the body of the barren golden grass cracked, and the origin aura belonging to the stone dragon demon lord emerged.

And the body that belonged to the stone dragon demon lord was naturally directly abandoned by him.

If other perfect controllers dare to abandon their own essence, it is not suicide.

However, the Stone Dragon Demon Lord was not afraid.

......

"It's not good, the Stone Dragon Demon Lord is out of trouble!"

The Lord of Time's face changed.

The other perfect controllers also realized the big problem, and no longer cared about the rules this time, and went directly to Shilongyuan.

Bang!!!

Many perfect controllers descended, and terrifying forces sealed the entire Shilong Yuan.

However, at this moment, the Stone Dragon Demon Lord had already occupied the shattered fragments of the Desolate Golden Grass and was reborn on this body.

However, he did not restore the torn body.

He was ready to commit suicide.

"A bunch of garbage, you can't stop me!"

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord sneered.

At this moment, Ye Tian and the others, who are at the peak of the half-step perfect controller, are not far from the Stone Dragon Demon Lord, but they are directly imprisoned under the power of the Stone Dragon Demon Lord at the moment, and they can't move, where can they stop it!

The next moment.

The Stone Dragon Demon Lord exploded, and countless black lights seemed to devour the entire Stone Dragon Abyss.

The Lord of Time couldn't stop the Stone Dragon Demon Lord, and he only had time to protect Ye Tian and other peak half-step perfect controllers, after all, it was a trivial matter for Ye Tian's body to fall, but if a few Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits were lost, it would be a big loss.

After all, this time I came to break free from the Golden Fruit, so I can't lose everything.

Bang!!!

The entire Shilong Yuan was completely shattered, and only the formation reinforced by the Perfect Controller remained, but this was meaningless.

Because the Stone Dragon Demon Lord abandoned his body, was reborn in the body of the Wild Golden Grass, and then committed suicide, which caused the sealed Stone Dragon Demon Lord's body to also turn into a corpse.

It can be said that this place has been abandoned, and there is no need to keep it.

Woohoo!!

The peak half-step perfect controllers were brought out one by one, and Ye Tian was also brought out by the Lord of Time.

Now.

The Lord of Time, their faces were gloomy, and they underestimated the Stone Dragon Demon Lord.

"I underestimated the Stone Dragon Demon Lord this time, I didn't expect the Stone Dragon Demon Lord to have such a means. The Lord of Time sighed.

The Lord of Xuanluo said: "I am also responsible, I didn't expect this step. The strength of the Stone Dragon Demon Lord is about the same as ours, or a little weaker, but he has too many means. And if you can't kill or not, it's really hard to entangle. "

"Unless it's those guys who make a move!"

A perfect controller spoke.

When the Lord of Time heard this, he immediately understood who he was talking about, it was an existence at the true peak of the Eternal Ruins, even more powerful than them.

However, the meaning of the pursuit of such beings is different, and they will not participate in such things.

It was impossible for them to bother those people because of this matter, after all, no matter how powerful the Stone Dragon Demon Lord was, it would not threaten the status of the top forces, it would just bring them some trouble.

Moreover, those few are happy to see this, at least it will bring some pressure to the top forces, and there is room for improvement only when there is pressure!

What's the point of those few people if they all shoot and kill all the troubles and enemies.

"Let's go, Shi Longyuan will cease to exist in the future!"

The Lord of Time left the Stone Dragon Holy City with Ye Tian and the others.

The other forces have also left.

From now on, the Stone Dragon Holy City will become an ordinary giant city, and there will no longer be many perfect controllers guarding it.

"Ye Tian, how many Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits have you obtained?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Six!"

Ye Tian replied.

"That's right, make good use of these six Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits, and strive to reach the half-step perfect controller realm of the Extreme Creation Realm as soon as possible, and reaching the half-step perfect controller realm of the Extreme Creation Realm is a new beginning!"

The Lord of Time said.

"Yes, I'll work hard!"

Ye Tianying said.

Then, Ye Tian asked again: "Lord of Time, who was suppressed under the Stone Dragon Demon Abyss before?"

The Lord of Time said lightly: "It's a guy called the Stone Dragon Demon Lord, the other party itself is not the life of the Eternal Ruins, but a special life from the end of the realm - the Stone Dragon, and later entered the Eternal Ruins, joined a certain force, and later killed countless people in the Eternal Ruins, and offended our Wudao Tower and other forces, so he was killed by us." As a result, not long after, he returned. We killed again and again, and he just didn't die. Don't think that we are killing the clone of the will, in fact we are killing his essence. At the level of the perfect controller, through the will clone, it is impossible to find the opponent's body. But we just can't kill him. In desperation, we sealed it up, but we didn't expect to get him out of trouble again this time. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

Soon, they were back at the Pathless Tower.

And after returning to the Wudao Tower, Ye Tian couldn't help but laugh.

"This harvest is too big, I didn't expect that in addition to the six Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits, I also obtained the perfect level ancestral endowment of the Stone Dragon Demon Lord!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

Moreover, the Stone Dragon Demon Lord's perfect-level ancestral endowment is very special.
